description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow for Windows using Conda. The workflow should trigger on push and pull request events, ignoring certain paths. It should run a build job with a matrix strategy for different compilers on Windows, and a separate check job that runs on Ubuntu. The build job should check out the repository, set up caching, install Miniconda, and build and test the Pinocchio project. The check job should verify that the build job succeeded.
